'''Terry Pavlet''' provided interior illustrations for several roleplaying game books from [[West End Games]].

==Contributions==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Terry Pavlet}}
*''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''
*''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]''
*''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''
*''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''
*''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''
